step_rationale: Methyltransferase regulating PFKL and NETosis in neutrophil inflammatory pathways.
mechanism: PRMT9-mediated arginine methylation of PFKL and other substrates controls neutrophil activation and NET formation during coronary thrombosis.

references.title: Cardiac PDK4 promotes neutrophilic PFKL methylation and drives the innate immune response in diabetic myocardial infarction.
